name: Iso11783IL_OPGetAttribute
title: Iso11783IL_OPGetAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPGetAttribute( dword objectID, dword attributeID ); // form 1
description: The function returns a value of an object attribute from the local object pool. A Get Attribute command is not sent to the Virtual Terminal. The object must exist in the object pool and support the attribute ID.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: object identifier of an object in the object pool

return:
integer value of the object
If a value of 0 is returned, you can check with the function Iso11783IL_GetLastError if the function succeeded.
